summary: Iteration 3: Mobile sidebar (Sheet-based) and desktop navbar testing. All new features verified. Regression tests pass.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} (Radix accessibility warning - cosmetic only, no functional impact)

action_items: Optional: Add aria-describedby or SheetDescription to SheetContent to resolve Radix accessibility console warning
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar data-state attribute returns null/None after close (Radix removes the element from DOM on close), but is_visible() returns False correctly — closing works fine.
Active link underline indicator uses inline style transitions — correct behavior verified at desktop viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: mobile toggle (nav-mobile-toggle) opens Sheet sidebar from right with brand, star rating, 6 nav links (nav-mobile-home/menu/reviews/gallery/about/visit), address/phone/hours info, and reserve CTA (nav-mobile-reserve). All nav clicks close sidebar and scroll. Desktop navbar shows horizontal links (nav-home etc.) with active underline indicator; mobile toggle hidden at 1440px. Regression: forms, pagination, maps all working per iter_2 context.
